title: Adopt CorvidLabs trust toolchain for the private aps CLI
description: Adopt CorvidLabs trust toolchain for the private aps CLI
no_spec_change_rationale: Bootstrap governance, CI, and committed module contracts without applying semantic deltas; aps-cli and state-store specs are authored as canonical companions in the same PR.
acceptance_criteria: fledge verify lane builds tests and smokes aps; SpecSync registry lists aps-cli and state-store; Trust config and AGENTS.md markers are committed; CI and Trust workflows run on self-hosted macOS only
